items.caption: A transparent png of an anime-style character, mikoto misaka, from the series "a certain scientific railgun." she is depicted in a dynamic pose with her right arm extended and her left hand holding a small object, possibly a smartphone. her hair is styled in a bob cut with bangs, and she wears a school uniform consisting of a white blouse with a collar, a beige vest, and a dark blue skirt. the background is transparent, emphasizing the character.
